description: I-BAC ingaqhubeka ikhuphuka ngemva kokuyeka ukuphuza, futhi ukuphuza utshwala esiswini esingenalutho noma ukuba nesisindo esincane kungayandisa i-BAC.
Uma lina kakhulu, ukushiya isikhala esengeziwe kubalulekile ngoba ukumisa ibanga kuyakhula futhi ukubonakala kungancipha.
Uma udlula imoto yezimo eziphuthumayo emile enezibani ezikhanyayo, kufanele wehlise ijubane futhi udlule ngokucophelela.
Uma uzizwa ugula noma ukhathele ngendlela engajwayelekile, ungashayeli uze ube sesimweni esihle futhi uqaphile, ngoba lokho kungathinta ikhono lakho lokushayela.
Ukuskena umgwaqo ongaphambili kusiza ukuthola izingozi kusenesikhathi, okukuvumela ukuthi uhlele futhi uphendule ngokuphephile.
Uma uhlanganyela imigwaqo nezimoto ezinkulu, kufanele unikeze isikhathi esengeziwe kanye nendawo ukuqinisekisa ukuphepha.
Ukudonsa isikebhe ngale kwemingcele esemthethweni kungaholela ezinhlawulweni noma ezijezisweni.
Uphawu oluthi CHA U-TURN lubonisa ukuthi ukujika u-U kuleyo ndawo akuvunyelwe.
Akufanele upake ngaphakathi kwebanga elinqunyelwe ukusuka endaweni yokuhlangana kwemigwaqo engenazimpawu.
Ezindaweni zokuwela izingane, abahamba ngezinyawo babaluleke kakhulu lapho kubekwa amafulegi.
Ukuhlolwa kokuphefumula okungahleliwe kusetshenziselwa ukuvimbela nokuthola ukushayela uphuzile. Uma kudingeka, kufanele ubambisane futhi unikeze isampula yokuphefumula.
Endaweni yesikole, kufanele ulandele umkhawulo wejubane eliphansi oboniswa ngezikhathi ezibekiwe.
Uma usondela emgqeni wokuma endaweni yokuhlangana kwemigwaqo ngaphandle kophawu, kumelwe ume emgqeni bese uvumela indlela.
Ezimweni ezimanzi, gcina igebe elikhulu phakathi kwezimoto ukuze uvimbele izingozi ngenxa yokuncipha kokubambelela kanye nebanga lokuma.
Gwema amaloli ahamba ngemuva ngoba kunciphisa ukubonakala kanye nebanga lokuma.
Uma abasebenzi bekhona, kufanele ushayele ngokucophelela, noma ngabe akukho sibonakaliso sejubane lesikhashana esibonakalayo.
Ungashayela emzileni webhasi kuphela uma kuvunyelwe yizimpawu nangezikhathi ezibekiwe.
Uma udlula imoto yezimo eziphuthumayo emile enezibani ezikhanyayo, kufanele wehlise ijubane futhi udlule ngokucophelela.
Izimoto ezivunyelwe uphawu kuphela ezingasebenzisa izindawo zokulayisha; ukusetshenziswa kabi kungaholela ezinhlawulweni.
Uma abasebenzi bekhona, kufanele ushayele ngokucophelela, noma ngabe akukho sibonakaliso sejubane lesikhashana esibonakalayo.
